\tzpentry{ID5646}{Angular Velocity Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5646 introduces Angular Velocity Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\Omega}^{\mathrm{node}}_i = \nu_i + \sum_{j\neq i} C_{ij}\,\sin\!\big(\Omega^{\mathrm{node}}_j-\Omega^{\mathrm{node}}_i\big), \label{eq:node_kuramoto} \end{equation}
